data.visa_type_detail: Temporary Employment Visas (H, L, O, P, Q) - For approved petition-based temporary employment in the United States.
Exchange Visitor Visa (J) - For certain teachers, professors, summer work travel, and other exchange participants, accepted for approved programs.
Media Visa (I) - For members of the foreign media, press, and radio.

Treaty Trader & Investor Visa (E) - For executives, managers, and essential workers of qualified companies from treaty countries, who qualify to conduct treaty-based trade or investment in the United States.
NAFTA Professional Worker Visa (TN/TD) - Visas for Canadian and Mexican USMCA Professional Workers.

essential_apps.description: Helps manage mail, track packages, find post office locations, and schedule pickups for an essential federal service.
Manages prescriptions, finds CVS stores and MinuteClinics, and accesses digital coupons from one of the largest pharmacy chains.
Provides comprehensive navigation for driving, walking, cycling, and public transport across all US cities.
A widely used peer-to-peer payment app for sending and receiving money, splitting bills, and making purchases.
